_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With VIX elevated and ETF flows diverging sharply from the bottom analog, the market needs confirmation either way—fear dropping below 25 with VIX spiking above 75 would confirm a flush to Panic, while BTC breaking $70k with sustained funding above 55 would signal recovery to Complacency.
next_move.brains_agree: No—analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing conflicting factors; narrative implies accumulation entry with high confidence, a material split on both direction and conviction
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 and funding collapses to sub-35 with VIX spiking above 75 (confirming shift down to Panic) OR BTC breaks above $70k with funding sustaining above 55 and fear_greed climbing above 40 (confirming shift up to Complacency)
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed stabilizes in current band with VIX normalizing below 50 and ETF flows remaining elevated, keeping the market locked in Anxiety chop with no directional resolution
